title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Chat with local LLMs from Python scripts or notebooks.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package integrating Ollama models into LangChain LLM abstractions.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama. Run in Docker, supports multi-model chats.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper that adds conversation memory and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experiment to replicate GitHub Copilot autocomplete using Ollama-hosted CodeLlama.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Lightweight bot that exposes Ollama models as slash commands in Discord servers.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with reactive streaming and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rag
summary: PR adding Ollama support to Superagent, enabling local RAG pipelines without OpenAI.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or chatters in pipelines.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat app that talks to Ollama; useful for quick internal demos.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package download page for the Ollama JavaScript client.

title: ollama-models
summary: Registry of community-contributed Modelfile definitions for niche or fine-tuned models.
